title: UwUfied
description: A mod that UwUfies every text in the game
body:
A mod that UwUfies every text in the game

You didn't know that you needed it, but you won't imagine your Minecwaft expewience without it after using it.

![UwUfied Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40ea10a3743ffdea58e0c9772878c13a6a21bd6a.png)
